category_sources: Official Thomas Jensen software page describes tal as a text filter for alignment of line endings.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official Thomas Jensen software page use lowercase "tal".
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best documentation surface, and the official examples page documents command behavior and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Thomas Jensen pages and tarball are project/distribution pages, not an official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official software page describes tal as an ANSI C text filter for aligning common trailing characters/line endings; examples page documents CLI usage.
